data.title: Ball Corporation to participate in Bank of America's 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference. Leading provider of sustainable aluminum packaging. (Character count: 129)
data.description: A global provider of sustainable aluminum packaging, Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL), based in Westminster, Colo., is set to participate in the Bank of America 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 17. With a focus on beverage, personal, and home care products, Ball Corporation is a leading player in the industry. This event offers a platform for the corporation to showcase its expertise in sustainable packaging solutions.

data.description: Houston-based Bristow Group Inc. (NYSE: VTOL), a prominent provider of innovative vertical flight solutions, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 25, 2026, after the market closes. data.title: Chemours declares $0.0875 per share quarterly dividend for Q1 2026. Board of Directors announced the dividend.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware on February 17, 2026, the chemical company Chemours (NYSE: CC) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0875 per share for the first quarter of 2026 on its common stock.

data.title: Simmons First National announces $175M common stock repurchase program authorized by the Board of Directors.
data.description: Simmons First National Corporation (NASDAQ: SFNC) headquartered in Pine Bluff, Arkansas, revealed on February 17, 2026, that their Board of Directors has given the green light for a fresh stock repurchase initiative. This program will amount to $175 million and is aimed at bolstering the market value of the company's shares. Simmons' latest move signifies their confidence in the company's financial standing and a commitment to maximizing shareholder value. This authorization emphasizes the company's strong position in the market.

data.title: Empire State Realty Trust (NYSE: ESRT) reports Q4 and full year 2025 results for its NYC-focused REIT. Flagship Empire State Building named top attraction in NYC for fourth year.
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESRT) is a Real Estate Investment Trust based in NYC. The company owns and manages a collection of office, retail, and multifamily properties in the city. Its most prominent asset is the Empire State Building, renowned as the "World's Most Famous Building". The building's Observatory, a top tourist destination, was recently recognized as the #1 attraction in NYC for the fourth year in a row in Tripadvisor's 2025 Travelers’ Choice Awards. ESRT's portfolio consists of well-leased, modernized, and strategically located assets.

data.title: Cadence Design Systems Inc (NASDAQ: CDNS) beats Q4 estimates with revenue of $1.44 billion and earnings of $1.99 per share, up 14% year-over-year. Record backlog of $7.8 billion and $3 billion cash on hand.
data.description: Cadence Design Systems Inc disclosed their financial performance for the fourth quarter after market close, showcasing impressive numbers. Surpassing expectations, the company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $1.44 billion, higher than the predicted $1.42 billion. Additionally, their adjusted earnings for the same period were $1.99 per share, exceeding estimates of $1.91 per share. The total revenue for the quarter experienced a notable 14% increase compared to the previous year. Closing the quarter on a high note, Cadence Design Systems accumulated a record backlog of $7.8 billion and held approximately $3 billion in cash and cash equivalents. The CEO attributed this success to robust customer demand for their expanding range of products.

data.title: Center (CSR) Q4 earnings exceeded expectations by 257.14%, EPS $1.25 vs $0.35 estimate. Revenue increased by $212k.

The significant highlights from the report include surpassing estimated earnings by 257.14%, achieving an EPS of $1.25 compared to the $0.35 estimate. Revenue showed growth, increasing by $212,000 from the previous year. In the preceding quarter, the company also outperformed expectations. For more details, the complete article can be accessed through Benzinga.com.

data.title: Calling medical providers with ICE detention facility experience to share insights. Contact us.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.7%, with a total of 10 million individuals currently out of work. This marks a significant increase from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The report also highlighted that the job market continues to be challenging, with job openings decreasing by 15% compared to the same time last year. Additionally, the report stated that the number of long-term unemployed individuals, those out of work for 27 weeks or more, has risen to 4.2 million. Experts are expressing concerns about the impact of these numbers on the overall economy and are urging for additional support for both the unemployed individuals and businesses struggling to recover from the ongoing economic challenges.
